message:
refactor(patterns): extract anchor matching logic and optimize data structures

Major refactoring of pattern matching engine to reduce code duplication
and improve memory efficiency in hot paths.

Structural changes:
- Add capture_names: Vec<String> to CompiledRule (pre-computed at build)
- Introduce AnchorMatchRef type alias for (anchor_idx, span) pairs
- Extract collect_candidate_rules() helper (replaces 40+ lines of
  inline matching logic in detection path)
- Extract collect_candidate_rules_with_all_anchors() for redact path
- Extract extract_captures() to centralize regex capture extraction

Performance:
- Switch anchor storage from Vec<(String, span)> to
  Vec<Option<AnchorMatchRef>> using indices instead of cloned strings
- Update fallback anchor handling to dereference from index.anchor_list
- Replace HashMap operations with .get() on indexed vectors

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
